index.title: Steam Library Space
index.subtitle: Your personalized gameplay analytics dashboard

credentials.title: Steam API Credentials
credentials.description: Credentials are stored locally in your browser and used only to query Steam.
credentials.apiKeyPlaceholder: Paste your Steam Web API Key
credentials.apiKeyHelp: You can obtain a key for free from the official page:
credentials.steamIdHelp: This is a 17-digit numeric code. You can find yours by searching your username at websites like steamid.io or checking your Steam Profile URL.
credentials.activeConfigHelp: Currently loading your library automatically using key & ID from the server-side env variables (.env). Entering keys above will temporarily override the server defaults.
credentials.validationError: Please provide both a Steam API Key and a Steam 64 ID.
credentials.importError: Invalid settings file. Please check the JSON format.

index.noGamesDesc: Try refining your search keyword or clearing the search box.

detox.title: Gaming Time Quality
detox.description: Digital detox metric: shows the balance between emotional rest and routine gaming 'work'. Story games yield emotions, session games drain time.
detox.customizeDesc: Here you can manually toggle the category of games played in the last 2 weeks. We auto-classified popular titles.

inactive.title: Great real-life balance
inactive.desc: Very little playtime in the past 2 weeks. A great balance with real life!

critical.title: Second shift worker
critical.desc: Dude, you're not resting, you're working a second shift! Go play something linear and atmospheric, or just turn off the computer and go outside.

poor.title: Emotional deficit
poor.desc: Too many session games in your diet. They drain you rather than give new emotions. Try diluting them with a good story game.

balanced.title: Good balance
balanced.desc: Good balance! You successfully combine session matches with atmospheric stories. Keep it up.

excellent.title: Pure enjoyment
excellent.desc: Excellent gaming quality! You play for emotions and stories. A true rest for your mind.

roulette.btn: Get Me Out of This Swamp!
roulette.title: Life Saver Roulette
roulette.landing: Forget about competitive matches today! Return to this game for some real emotions:
roulette.playtime: You have {hours} hrs there. Play atmospheric!

game.noAchievementsDesc: Try refining your search keyword or clearing the search box.
game.nextDesc: These locked achievements have the highest global unlock percentages. They should be your next target!
game.congratsDesc: You have unlocked all achievements in this game! A true perfectionist.
